author: IGN YouTube
text:
Warhammer 40K Expert Explains Blood Angels and Armageddon
Watch a Warhammer 40,000 expert answer the biggest Blood Angels questions of 40K! Who are the Blood Angels? What is The Red Thirst and Black Rage? Who leads the Blood Angels? How are the Blood Angels different? And what is Armageddon? Arbitor Ian, our 40K lore master and expert, is here to answer all of your 40K grimdark Blood Angels and Sanguinius questions and mysteries.

Interested in the Warhammer 40,000 11th Edition? This lore overview video will cover what you need to know about Armageddon and this blood-soaked Space Marine chapter.
Arbitor Ian is a Warhammer content creator with a focus on introducing 40K lore to newcomers and veterans alike.

text:
Empulse - Official 'The World of Empulse' Trailer
'What will you fight for?' Get a deep dive into the world of Empulse in this latest trailer for the upcoming first-person 6v6 arcade movement mech shooter developed by 1047 Games. Learn about the story setup, the different crews, and more. Empulse will be available in Early Access on Steam, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Xbox Series X/S on June 24, 2026. A demo is out now on Steam as part of Steam Next Fest.

In Empulse, wall-run, grapple, Holojump, pilot mechs, and P.A.I.N.T. your way through Freehold's vertical streets. Outmove your opponent or get outgunned.

text:
Star Wars: The Old Republic - Official Legacy Reborn Launch Trailer
The finale to Legacy of the Sith is here. Watch the Star Wars: The Old Republic 'Legacy Reborn' launch trailer for this Game Update 7.9 for the MMORPG. Darth Jadus has stolen the key to Darth Nul’s masterworks, and the race to the forgotten fortress of Naga Sadow on Khar Shian has begun. In the Legacy Reborn update, the battle transcends your own perspective. For the first time, take control of your allies in unique gameplay to reach the final showdown. With Malgus, Shae Vizla, and the Hidden Chain converging on the Sith moon, the outcome will determine the fate of the galaxy!

Game Update 7.9 'Legacy Reborn' is available now in Star Wars: The Old Republic.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Pompeii: Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston - Official Trailer (2026)
Take a look at the Official Trailer for Pompeii: Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston, a new three-part docudrama distributed by National Geographic. Hear the final hours before the eruption of Mount Vesuvius from previously unaccounted-for perspectives in Pompeii: Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston, streaming on July 23 on Disney+ and Hulu, alongside premiering on National Geographic on July 22.

Host and “Loki” star Tom Hiddleston and “Loki” executive producer Kevin R. Wright reunite for Pompeii: Out of Time, a fusion of cinematic scripted drama and investigative documentary storytelling that transports audiences to ancient Rome in the hours before and during the eruption of Mount Vesuvius. Guided by a team of archaeologists, historians, geologists and disaster experts, he uncovers remarkable evidence — and the stories of real people that challenge long-held assumptions about Pompeii and its final hours — not least revealing that many of those caught up in the disaster had the chance to survive. Blending cutting-edge archaeological discoveries, expert analysis and deeply personal storytelling, the series reframes Pompeii not as a story of destruction but as a human drama of resilience, sacrifice and survival, revealing the lives, choices and destinies of those who stood in the shadow of Vesuvius.

Pompeii: Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston is streaming on July 23 on Disney+ and Hulu, alongside premiering on National Geographic on July 22.

#IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Hexed - Official Teaser Trailer (2026) Hailee Steinfeld, Rashida Jones
Check out the teaser trailer for Disney's Hexed, an upcoming animated magical coming-of-age adventure film. Hexed features the voice talents of Hailee Steinfeld as Billie, Rashida Jones as Billie's mother Alice, Tracey Ullman as the enchanted feather quill pen Ms. Quill, and Stephen Fry as the magical journal Elias Quire.

In Hexed, an awkward teen and her Type-A mother learn her peculiarities might be magical powers, transforming their lives and revealing a hidden magical realm.

Disney’s Hexed is directed by Fawn Veerasunthorn and Jason Hand, co-directed by Josie Trinidad, and produced by Roy Conli and Yvett Merino. Hexed opens in theaters on November 25, 2026.

#IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Stranger Than Heaven Hands-On Impressions: Yakuza, Like A Souls Game
Stranger Than Heaven is the next game from RGG Studio, makers of the Yakuza / Like A Dragon series, and this time it's taking you through Japan's past across five different decades in five different cities to tell the story of Makoto Daito and the origins of the infamous Tojo Clan. It uses action combat, but nothing like it was in the Yakuza games, because it has a much more in-depth slower-paced fighting system that looks to be challenging. We got to play a brief demo at Summer Game Fest, and these are our thoughts right from the show itself. Stranger Than Heaven launches on January 15, 2027 for PlayStation, Xbox, and PC.

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Toy Story 5 Review
Woody, Buzz, Jessie and the rest of the toys are back for Toy Story 5, and this time they're facing the toughest threat yet... screen time! While it's been a flagship franchise for animation pioneer Pixar, they've managed to write two separate satisfying endings for the sentient toys. So why do they keep coming back? Clint Gage reviews the fifth installment of the series to talk about that, plus series newcomers like Lillypad (Greta Lee) and Smarty Pants (Conan O'Brien) why some legacy characters getting sidelined is exactly what Toy Story needs, and the conversations he had with his kids after the screening!

#ToyStory5 #Movies #IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
How UE6 Will Shape the Future For Gaming
Unreal Engine 6 has been revealed and tons of information has been shared about how it'll affect game development in the near future. From streamlining the creation of dense games for smaller teams, to the integration of AI tools within the engine, UE6 is promising a lot. Among the titles shown off to help showcase these feats were Gears of War: E-Day, Fornite, Rocket League, and more. Here's all the news that came from the Unreal Fest reveal.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
State of Unreal 2026: All the 4K Gameplay
Look, we get it: if you love games but you’re not a game dev, the annual State of Unreal showcase can be a chore. Having to sit through all the powerpoint presentations about render pipelines and asset workflows in the scant hope of getting a glimpse at The Witcher 4? It truly is the most underwhelming finale to every Summer of Gaming. Well, if you just want to see all the new gameplay in retina-searing 4K without any of the faff, we’ve got you covered.

Here’s the full Gears of War: E-day technical showcase, complete with a fresh look at an Unreal 5 rendered corpser attack. Literal minutes of beautifully grimy first-person footage from No Law, Neon Giant’s follow-up to The Ascent. And a tantalising glimpse of how shiny the Rocket League cars are going to get when Psyonix’s ever-popular vehicular football tournament gets ported over to the upcoming Unreal Engine 6.

Oh, yeah, there was actually nothing from The Witcher 4. Sorry to get your hopes up.

#IGN #Gaming

text:
Gloria Victis - Official Re-Launch Trailer
Gloria Victis returns as a free-to-play game. Watch the Gloria Victis relaunch trailer for this medieval open-world PvP siege MMORPG. Gloria Victis is available now on Steam.

Gloria Victis features action-based non-target combat and PVP with territory control, meaning one’s skill can mean the difference between life and death. It also features a deep crafting system, wherein players can use the materials they gather to create goods used for trade and participate in the player-driven economy.

Access the new Kowakujo Zombies map for Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 on June 25 on PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, and PC.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Official Trailer 2 (2026) Tom Holland, Zendaya, Mark Ruffalo
Four years since the events of No Way Home, Peter Parker (Tom Holland) has been forgotten and has lost himself inside his alter-ego Spider-Man, protecting New York full-time. 
Starring Tom Holland, Zendaya, Jon Bernthal, Mark Ruffalo, Sadie Sink, Jacob Batalon, and Michael Mando. 

It's been four years since Peter Parker (Tom Holland) made the ultimate sacrifice to save the multiverse, and the world has forgotten who he is. His friends Ned Lees (Jacob Batalon) and MJ (Zendaya) have moved on with life, and Peter has fallen into being a full-time Spider-Man. Being New York's full-time super-hero protector has Peter rubbing shoulders with Frank Castle (Jon Bernthal) and battling Scorpion (Michael Mando), but with the arrival of a new threat, and Peter's powers evolving, things will never be the same again. 

Starring Tom Holland, Zendaya, Jon Bernthal, Mark Ruffalo, Sadie Sink, Jacob Batalon, and Michael Mando. 

Spider-Man: Brand New Day arrives in theaters July 31st.

The Odyssey - Official 'Fantastic Voyage' Behind-the-Scenes Video (2026) Matt Damon, Anne Hathaway
Join director/writer/producer Christoper Nolan and the cast of The Odyssey for a behind-the-scenes look at the upcoming mythic action epic film. Join the team as they explore the global locations of The Odyssey and discuss their experiences filming at various sites around the world. The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson, Himesh Patel, and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron. 

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip. 

The Odyssey opens in IMAX and theaters on July 17, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Unreal Engine 6 - Reveal Overview | State of Unreal 2026
Get a look at Reveal Overview for Unreal Engine 6, the next core update to the hit video game processing and development engine developed by Epic Games. Unreal Engine 6 is focusing on implementing features to support the future of game development with support for larger game simulations, improved scalability across a number of systems, and more. Game developers and creators will also interact with new ways to operate and ship games with Unreal Engine 6, including LLM and Model-assisted workflows intended on creating improved efficiency during development and reduce tedious steps to heighten creative work. Improved gameplay architectures are also included in Unreal Engine 6, allowing for streamlined gameplay systems creations that work across multiple games with ease. Lore powers enhanced storage and version control systems to support next-generation needs by combining assets and source files logic to aid development teams worldwide. Unreal Engine 6 is set to release in Early Access in 2027. 

#ign #gaming #summerofgaming

Iron Nest: Heavy Turret Simulator - Official Demo Trailer
Take a look at gameplay from Iron Nest: Heavy Turret Simulator in this trailer for the upcoming brutal dieselpunk heavy-artillery game where you dominate the battlefield through a colossal war machine. Take map measurements based on the received coordinates, strain the hydraulics, and gunlay the cannons to unleash devastating blows. Will you obey High Command, Operator? Iron Nest: Heavy Turret Simulator will be available on PC in August 2026. A demo will be available on Steam beginning June 15, 2026.
